originalTitle: Zscaler’s stock sees record drop after investors are blindsided by a disappointing outlook
summary: Shares of Zscaler were headed for a record one-day decline of more than 31% after the cybersecurity company shocked investors with a downbeat revenue outlook.
content: Shares of Zscaler were headed for a record one-day decline of more than 31% after the cybersecurity company shocked investors with a downbeat revenue outlook.
chineseTitle: 投资者因前景令人失望而措手不及，Zscaler 股价创历史新高
chineseSummary: 在网络安全公司 Zscaler 悲观的收入前景震惊投资者后，该公司股价单日跌幅创纪录，跌幅超过 31%。
chineseContent: 在网络安全公司 Zscaler 悲观的收入前景震惊投资者后，该公司股价单日跌幅创纪录，跌幅超过 31%。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
